title: The Weakest Link — Descent Lifting Under Full Arsenal

analysis.object: T747: The Weakest Link — Descent Lifting Under Full Arsenal depth analysis

weakest_link_id.description: T746 identified: tropical descent lifting -- classical algebraization of tropical preimage
weakest_link_id.reason: Every approach reduces to this one step

artin_approximation.description: Artin approximation: formal solution -> algebraic solution
artin_approximation.reason: Proved for formal power series -- might apply

artin_and_hodge.description: If tropical cycle is formal algebraization of Hodge class, Artin gives algebraic cycle
artin_and_hodge.reason: Direct application IF formal = tropical in this context

formal_vs_tropical.description: Tropical geometry is NOT formal power series -- Artin does not directly apply
formal_vs_tropical.reason: The gap: tropical != formal in the relevant sense

berkovich_approach.description: Berkovich analytification provides a formal structure on tropical side
berkovich_approach.reason: Berkovich spaces are EML-3 -- oscillatory analytic

berkovich_artin.description: Berkovich + Artin approximation: algebraize Berkovich section?

t747_result.description: Berkovich + Artin = most promising path to descent lifting. Not proved. T747 identifies this as THE attack point.
t747_result.reason: The problem now has a name and a specific mathematical target

analysis.theorem: T747: The Weakest Link — Descent Lifting Under Full Arsenal (S1026).

key_theorem: T747: The Weakest Link — Descent Lifting Under Full Arsenal (S1026).
